The idea for 来源  story comes from a story series published at ASSM called 来源  Land.
As I enjoyed what is happening on the lesbian side of things, I thought us guys should getto be part of the 来源  too.
So, hopefully, with imitation being the highest form of flattery, I bring you 来源  World.
I hope you 来源  it.)
